plot outline: A gritty L.A crime saga which follows the intersecting and often personally connected lives of an elite unit of the LA County Sheriff's Dept. and the state's most successful bank robbery crew as the outlaws plan an impossible heist on the Federal Reserve Bank of downtown Los Angeles.
title: Den of Thieves
akas: Juego de ladrones: El atraco perfecto (Spain)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
